scenes.caption: The Canvas Awaits
scenes.visual_prompt: Cinematic photograph of a minimalist, clean desk setup. A laptop screen displays a blank document with the cursor blinking. Soft, natural morning light spills in from a window, creating a hopeful, calm mood. Low angle, slightly looking up at the screen.

scenes.caption: Crafting the Initial Draft
scenes.visual_prompt: Cinematic photograph of a close-up on a person's hands typing purposefully on a keyboard. Fingers are in motion, slightly blurred with action. The background is softly out of focus, suggesting deep concentration. Warm, focused task lighting from a desk lamp, creating an intimate, diligent mood. Medium shot, over the shoulder, focusing on the hands.

scenes.caption: Envisioning the Next Chapter
scenes.visual_prompt: Cinematic photograph of a person looking up from their laptop, gaze distant and thoughtful, perhaps towards a window or a board with ideas. A slight smile of contemplation or determination plays on their lips. Soft, diffused daylight illuminates their face, creating a reflective, hopeful mood. Medium shot, slightly from the side.

scenes.caption: The Blueprint for Tomorrow
scenes.visual_prompt: Cinematic photograph of a person at their desk, looking directly at the camera with a confident, determined expression. They might be holding a pen or resting hands on the keyboard, embodying readiness. Strong, directional lighting highlights their resolve, creating an empowering, focused mood. Close-up, eye-level.

scenes.caption: Anticipating the Full Story
scenes.visual_prompt: Cinematic photograph of a wide shot of the person at their desk, now looking out a large window at a vibrant cityscape or a serene landscape. The desk setup is visible but secondary to the character's forward-looking posture. Golden hour lighting casts long shadows and a warm glow, creating an expansive, inspiring mood of future possibilities. Wide shot, slightly elevated, capturing the environment and the character.
